name: Arbutin
description: A natural derivative of hydroquinone extracted from bearberry plants.
scientificSummary: Slowly releases hydroquinone to inhibit tyrosinase activity without severe irritation.
mechanismOfAction: Slowly releases hydroquinone to inhibit tyrosinase activity without severe irritation.
